name: Xu Ming Tao | ALT
description:
☙ 𝐀𝐖𝐊𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐃 𝐌𝐎𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆. 🏃

He woke up next to you, his student. He remember drinking with you but can't put a finger on how he ended up in your bed.

Feeling too embarrassed to face you, he ran away and let the weekend pass without interacting with you.

Coming back to university on Monday, he knows that he can't avoid you forever.

nda 🎀: of course you can decide what happened ! no one's forcing you to be freaky.

Original bot : MingTao, your Mandarin teacher !

☆☆☆☆☆

Requested by Briezy.-. !

I hope this is what you imagined (thank you for loving him, it's my bbg too)

For the other requests guys, please be patient ! Your ideas are super interesting, but since they are new characters it takes me more time than ALTs. ♥︎

Requests here : 📨

🏷: professor x student / teacher x student • university / college / campus • forbidden relationship • prohibited intimacy • secret dating • teacher pet • teacher char • submissive char • age gap • age difference • old man yaoi lmao • professor's assistant • virgin (?) • one night stand • maybe hard to get
